name: ExamPQA
desc: A clear, trustworthy identity for an exam-prep platform, with a guideline system built so a lean team could implement it consistently at speed.
focus: Academic seriousness. Student appeal. No compromise.

problem.headline: Academic seriousness. Student appeal. No compromise.
problem.body: ExamPQA needed a brand that parents and institutions could trust while genuinely resonating with students navigating high-stakes exams. The risk was over-indexing in either direction — too corporate for students, too casual for institutions.

overview: ExamPQA is an education technology platform providing structured past-question and exam preparation resources to students across Africa. The challenge was to position an academically serious product as approachable and modern — signalling trustworthiness to parents and institutions while remaining compelling for students.

process.title: Student Research
process.desc: Interviews with students across key exam markets revealed a consistent frustration: existing revision tools felt either boring or untrustworthy. ExamPQA had an opportunity to be both rigorous and genuinely motivating.

process.title: Positioning Strategy
process.desc: We defined ExamPQA's position as 'The Serious Student's Tool' — not a gamified learning app, not a textbook publisher, but a focused, high-performance preparation platform.

process.title: Identity Design
process.desc: The visual system draws from academic tradition — structure, clarity, hierarchy — while applying a modern energy through bold typography and a distinctive colour accent.

process.title: Digital System
process.desc: The identity was stress-tested across app UI, social campaigns, and marketing materials to ensure consistency across all digital touchpoints.

deliverables.name: Brand Strategy Document
deliverables.desc: Positioning, messaging framework, tone of voice guide

deliverables.name: Logo & Identity System
deliverables.desc: Primary mark, icon mark, wordmark system and variations

deliverables.name: Brand Guidelines
deliverables.desc: Full standards document including digital-first usage rules

deliverables.name: App UI Concepts
deliverables.desc: Onboarding flow and key screen design concepts

deliverables.name: Marketing Assets
deliverables.desc: Social media campaigns, print flyers, school posters

deliverables.name: Investor Pitch Deck
deliverables.desc: Designed pitch deck for Series A fundraising

outcome.headline: A brand that earns trust from institutions while genuinely appealing to students.
outcome.body: The identity creates a clear sense of rigour and momentum — communicating that this is a platform serious about outcomes. The system scales across app UI, social, and marketing without losing its essential character.
